zh.lifeSummary: 當David Fowler於1640年出生在英國時，他的父親John Fowles Jr33歲，母親Elizabeth Lyon26歲。他和Mary Hudson至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1702年10月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可里士滿享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: Fowler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fowler, a hunter or trapper of wild birds (a common medieval occupation), from Middle English fogheler, fugheler (Old English fugelere, a derivative of fugol ‘bird’).

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When David Fowler was born in 1640, in England, his father, John Fowles Jr, was 33 and his mother, Elizabeth Lyon, was 26. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Mary Hudson. He died on 21 October 1702, in Richmond, Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Fowler est né en 1640, à Angleterre, son père, John Fowles Jr, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lyon, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Mary Hudson. Il est décédé le 21 octobre 1702, à Richmond, Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: David Fowler(이)가 1640년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fowles Jr(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Lyon(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Mary Hudson(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1702년 10월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코 리ch몽에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Fowler родился в 1640 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John Fowles Jr было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lyon, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Mary Hudson. Он умер 21 октября 1702 г. в местности ричмонд, хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет.
